# Fluncle

> Drum & bass bangers from another dimension. Fluncle digs and certifies every track, publishes them to Spotify and Telegram, and keeps the full archive of his findings at fluncle.com.

Fluncle is a single selector, not a team. Every track in the archive is one he found, listened to, and certified. Dates mark when he found it: the day Fluncle first heard the tune, not the day it released.

The collection is called Fluncle's Findings. New tracks land most nights.

## Listen

- [Fluncle's Findings on Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/playlist/1m5LADqpLjiBERdtqrIiL0): the playlist itself
- [Fluncle on Telegram](https://t.me/fluncle): one banger per post, most nights
- [The archive](https://www.fluncle.com/): every certified track with the date Fluncle found it and notes
- [The log](https://www.fluncle.com/log): every finding's coordinate page, one per Log ID (e.g. https://www.fluncle.com/log/004.7.2I)
- [About Fluncle](https://www.fluncle.com/about): who Fluncle is, what the Galaxy is, and how to read a Log ID like fluncle://004.7.2I

## Data

- [RSS feed](https://www.fluncle.com/rss.xml): the 25 most recent tracks
- [Tracks API](https://www.fluncle.com/api/tracks): the archive as JSON, cursor-paginated; accepts limit (max 48) and cursor query params
- [Random track](https://www.fluncle.com/api/tracks/random): one pick from the archive, as JSON

## Submit

- [Search API](https://www.fluncle.com/api/search): GET with a q query param (a track search or Spotify URL), returns candidates as JSON
- [Submissions API](https://www.fluncle.com/api/submissions): POST a candidate for review; Fluncle gives it a listen before anything publishes

## For agents

- [OpenAPI spec](https://www.fluncle.com/openapi.json): the public API as an OpenAPI 3.1 document
- [API catalog](https://www.fluncle.com/.well-known/api-catalog): RFC 9727 linkset
- [Agent skills](https://www.fluncle.com/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json): the fluncle-api skill, with digest
- Markdown homepage: GET https://www.fluncle.com/ with Accept: text/markdown

## Tools

- [CLI installer](https://www.fluncle.com/cli/latest.sh): curl -fsSL https://www.fluncle.com/cli/latest.sh | sh, then try fluncle recent
- The rave terminal: ssh rave.fluncle.com, the deepest room in the Galaxy
